title: DrRman's Utils
description: A collection of performance, utility, and quality-of-life mods that enhance the vanilla Survival and Creative mode experience.
body:
This is an extensive modpack that consists of all of the mods that I personally use on a daily basis, which help streamline and enhance the vanilla experience. Firstly, it contains several performance mods to make the game run more efficiently, serving as the backbone for other quality-of-life and utility mods that would otherwise make the game run very slowly. Complementing those are several quality-of-life mods, such as a freely-movable camera and tooltips for shulker boxes, among other utilities.

This modpack shares several mods with the [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/simply-optimized) modpacks, but it differs by offering additional utilities that are useful for both Survival and Creative mode, thus aiding players in the gameplay experience. For more information, please see the gallery for images and a brief description of the features this pack provides.

<details>
  <summary>Version Numbering Format (for technical users)</summary>
The version numbering format for each release is `<last two digits of year>`.`<week of year>`.`<zero-indexed revision number>`+`<minecraft version>`.

  
  **Example for week 34 of 2030, first release of the week for MC 1.68.2:** 30.34.0+1.68.2
</details>
